entry.title: New: Bill 166 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, INCREASING ESTIMATED REVENUES, LICENSES/PERMITS/OTHERS, BY $350,000, CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, MAKAWAO-PUKALANI-KULA COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, APPENDIX A, PART II, GENERAL EXCISE TAX FUND, AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, MAKAWAO-PUKALANI-KULA COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, INCREASING THE APPROPRIATION FOR UPPER KULA TRANSMISSION IMPROVEMENTS BY $350,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
